name: research-route-skill
description: Example third-party skill that declares Converge-compatible current-route and research-plan behavior.

codex.claim: Installable as a Codex-style skill when copied into a configured skill root.
codex.claim_boundary: H1 installability does not prove response quality, native question UI, or production workflow coverage.

claude-code.claim: Can be adapted to Claude Code skill format, but this fixture does not claim a real local install.
claude-code.claim_boundary: H0 documentation coverage only until installed and release-checked in a real host.

cursor.claim: Can be adapted into Cursor rules, but this fixture does not claim native Cursor activation.
cursor.claim_boundary: H0 documentation coverage only until a Cursor bridge and real run are validated.
